sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 605, 606, 607, 608 & 609 of 2006 ITRA 396 of 2007 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ For hearing of main case 11.12.2025 Mr. Zeeshan Ahmed advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant Qazi Umair Ali, advocate for respondent in ITRA 605 of 2006 Messrs. Furqan Mushtaq advocate for respondent in ITRA 608 to 609 of 2006, along with Mr. Sami-ur-Rehman, advocate These matters are pending since 2006 and 2007 without any significant progress and even today, 19 years later, brief is merely being held for applicant’s counsel and adjournment sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. It appears that applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
